sentences.english: My favourite season is the rainy season.
sentences.hindi: मेरा पसंदीदा मौसम बारिश का मौसम है।
sentences.pronunciation: my favourite season is the rainy season

sentences.english: Everything becomes green in the rain.
sentences.hindi: बारिश में सब कुछ हरा-भरा हो जाता है।
sentences.pronunciation: everything becomes green in the rain

sentences.english: I like reading books a lot.
sentences.hindi: मुझे किताबें पढ़ना बहुत पसंद है।
sentences.pronunciation: i like reading books a lot

sentences.english: Books are a treasure of knowledge.
sentences.hindi: किताबें ज्ञान का भंडार होती हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: books are a treasure of knowledge

sentences.english: My village is very beautiful.
sentences.hindi: मेरा गाँव बहुत सुंदर है।
sentences.pronunciation: my village is very beautiful

sentences.english: There are green fields and clean air there.
sentences.hindi: वहाँ हरे-भरे खेत और साफ हवा है।
sentences.pronunciation: there are green fields and clean air there

sentences.english: Education is very important in life.
sentences.hindi: शिक्षा जीवन में बहुत महत्वपूर्ण है।
sentences.pronunciation: education is very important in life

sentences.english: It makes us a better person.
sentences.hindi: यह हमें एक बेहतर इंसान बनाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: it makes us a better person

sentences.english: We should make good use of time.
sentences.hindi: समय का सदुपयोग करना चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: we should make good use of time

sentences.english: The one who wastes time regrets later.
sentences.hindi: जो समय बर्बाद करता है, वह पछताता है।
sentences.pronunciation: the one who wastes time regrets later

sentences.english: Health is real wealth.
sentences.hindi: स्वास्थ्य ही असली धन है।
sentences.pronunciation: health is real wealth

sentences.english: We should exercise daily.
sentences.hindi: हमें रोज़ व्यायाम करना चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: we should exercise daily

sentences.english: My mother is my best friend.
sentences.hindi: मेरी माँ मेरी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त है।
sentences.pronunciation: my mother is my best friend

sentences.english: She always supports me.
sentences.hindi: वह हमेशा मेरा साथ देती है।
sentences.pronunciation: she always supports me

sentences.english: Nature teaches us a lot.
sentences.hindi: प्रकृति हमें बहुत कुछ सिखाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: nature teaches us a lot

sentences.english: We should protect trees.
sentences.hindi: हमें पेड़ों की रक्षा करनी चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: we should protect trees

sentences.english: India is a country of diversities.
sentences.hindi: भारत विविधताओं का देश है।
sentences.pronunciation: india is a country of diversities

sentences.english: There are many languages and cultures here.
sentences.hindi: यहाँ कई भाषाएँ और संस्कृतियाँ हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: there are many languages and cultures here

sentences.english: Hard work is the key to success.
sentences.hindi: मेहनत सफलता की कुंजी है।
sentences.pronunciation: hard work is the key to success

sentences.english: The one who works hard definitely succeeds.
sentences.hindi: जो मेहनत करता है वह जरूर सफल होता है।
sentences.pronunciation: the one who works hard definitely succeeds
